use sqlx::PgPool;

#[derive(sqlx::FromRow)]
struct OrderSummary {
    id: i64,
    customer_name: String,
    total: f64,
}

async fn get_order_summaries(pool: &PgPool) -> Result<Vec<OrderSummary>, sqlx::Error> {
    // BAD: SELECT * fetches all columns when only a few are needed
    sqlx::query_as::<_, OrderSummary>("SELECT * FROM orders")
        .fetch_all(pool)
        .await
}
